mapper.sql: select indicator_id, indicator_code, external_code, system_name, category_name, version_no, lifecycle_status, year_name, first_level, second_level, indicator_name, period_type, data_type, scoring_rule, algorithm_type, algorithm_params, responsible_unit, region_code, region_name, data_source, tag_names, sort_order, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from nc_fusion_indicator
mapper.select: where indicator_code = #{indicatorCode} and del_flag = '0' order by version_no desc, indicator_id desc limit 1
where indicator_code = #{indicatorCode} and lifecycle_status = 'enabled' and status = '0' and del_flag = '0' order by version_no desc, indicator_id desc limit 1
select max(version_no) from nc_fusion_indicator where indicator_code = #{indicatorCode} and del_flag = '0'

select count(1) from nc_fusion_indicator where indicator_code = #{indicatorCode} and lifecycle_status = 'enabled' and status = '0' and del_flag = '0'
and indicator_id != #{indicatorId}
mapper.insert: insert into nc_fusion_indicator (indicator_code, external_code, system_name, category_name, version_no, lifecycle_status, year_name, first_level, second_level, indicator_name, period_type, data_type, scoring_rule, algorithm_type, algorithm_params, responsible_unit, region_code, region_name, data_source, tag_names, sort_order, status, create_by, create_time, remark) values (#{indicatorCode}, #{externalCode}, #{systemName}, #{categoryName}, #{versionNo}, #{lifecycleStatus}, #{yearName}, #{firstLevel}, #{secondLevel}, #{indicatorName}, #{periodType}, #{dataType}, #{scoringRule}, #{algorithmType}, #{algorithmParams}, #{responsibleUnit}, #{regionCode}, #{regionName}, #{dataSource}, #{tagNames}, #{sortOrder}, #{status}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{remark})
